tasks.label: ⬆️ Up Frontend internal
tasks.detail: Start up the local docker dev environment

tasks.label: 🔗 Up Frontend internal with local Engine
tasks.detail: Start up using a locally-built fcp-sfd-frontend-engine (run 'npm run build' in the engine repo first)
tasks.command: docker compose -f compose.yaml -f compose.override.yaml -f compose.link-engine.yaml up --build

tasks.label: 🪵 Log Frontend internal
tasks.detail: Show the logs for the frontend internal

tasks.label: ✅ Test Frontend internal
tasks.detail: Run all unit tests for Frontend internal
tasks.command: docker compose down -v && docker compose -f compose.yaml -f compose.test.yaml run --build --rm 'fcp-sfd-frontend-internal'

tasks.label: ‼️ Only Test Frontend internal
tasks.detail: Run the currently selected test file for frontend internal
tasks.command: docker compose down -v && docker compose -f compose.yaml -f compose.test.yaml run --rm fcp-sfd-frontend-internal npx vitest run ${relativeFile}

tasks.label: Watch Test Frontend internal
tasks.detail: Run the test watcher for frontend internal
tasks.command: docker compose down -v && docker compose -f compose.yaml -f compose.test.watch.yaml run --build --rm 'fcp-sfd-frontend-internal'

tasks.label: 🔍 Lint Frontend internal
tasks.detail: Run linting on the frontend internal

tasks.label: 🧹 Lint Fix Frontend internal
tasks.detail: Automatically fix linting issues in the frontend internal codebase

tasks.label: 🛠️ Clean Frontend internal
tasks.detail: Will drop the containers, remove related images and volumes for frontend internal
tasks.command: docker compose down --rmi local -v; echo "All done! 🎉"
